title: trifolium noricum var. ottonis
intro: Trifolium noricum var. ottonis, also known as the Alpine Clover or Otton's Clover, is a variety of clover plant native to the European Alps. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Trifolium noricum var. ottonis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Trifolium noricum var. ottonis is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in salves and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
